# Roam Research Developer Documentation

> Markdown mirror of the official Roam Research developer docs graph, refreshed automatically,
> plus live-introspected TypeScript definitions for window.roamAlphaAPI (v1.1.2)
> and copy-pasteable examples. Sources of truth: the public developer-documentation
> graph and a running Roam Research session; regenerated on a schedule.

Last export: 2026-07-03T15:59:08.478Z

## Docs

- [Developer Hub](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/developer-hub.md): Entry point / map of all Roam Research developer documentation
- [Roam Alpha API](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/roam-alpha-api.md): The frontend JS API (window.roamAlphaAPI): datalog q/pull, block & page CRUD, UI control, file storage
- [Roam Depot/Extension API](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/roam-depot-extension-api.md): Extension API passed to Depot extensions (settings panels, commands, lifecycle)
- [Roam Depot/Extensions](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/roam-depot-extensions.md): How to build, test and publish Roam Depot extensions
- [roam/css](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/roam-css.md): Theming Roam Research with custom CSS via the roam/css page
- [roam/js](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/roam-js.md): Running custom JavaScript in a graph via roam/js blocks
- [roam/cljs](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/roam-cljs.md): Running ClojureScript in a graph
- [roam/render](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/roam-render.md): Custom components rendered inside blocks (ClojureScript/Reagent)
- [Roam Backend API (Beta)](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/roam-backend-api-beta.md): Official REST API: datalog q / pull / pull-many + write actions over HTTP with roam-graph-tokens
- [Roam Append API](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/roam-append-api.md): Append-only HTTP API for capture (works with encrypted graphs)
- [Yet-to-release updates](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/yet-to-release-updates.md): API changes announced but not yet released
- [Available Libraries](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/available-libraries.md): Official SDKs and community libraries
- [Contact Us](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/contact-us.md): How to reach the Roam Research developer team
- [Local API](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/local-api.md): Local HTTP API exposed by the Roam Research desktop app

## API reference

- [roam-alpha-api.d.ts](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/types/roam-alpha-api.d.ts): TypeScript definitions for window.roamAlphaAPI — all 129 live-introspected functions
- [llms-full.txt](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/llms-full.txt): Everything in one file: all docs pages + release notes + full API inventory

## Examples

- [01-queries.js](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/examples/01-queries.js)
- [02-writing-blocks.js](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/examples/02-writing-blocks.js)
- [03-extension-skeleton.js](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/examples/03-extension-skeleton.js)
- [04-backend-api.sh](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/examples/04-backend-api.sh)
- [05-backend-api.js](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/examples/05-backend-api.js)
- [06-render-components.js](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/examples/06-render-components.js)

## Optional

- [Roam Clojurescript API](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/roam-clojurescript-api.md): Clojure Core Namespaces
- [Datomic Alpha API](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/datomic-alpha-api.md): Important Note: This is the documentation for the Depreciated (& inactive) Datomic API. We have a new API! see it here, Roam Backend API (Be
- [iFrame Components](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/iframe-components.md): Important Note: This is Depreciated, it still most likely works but we will not be continuing it's development
- [Attributes Data Model](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/attributes-data-model.md): Introduction: it's a hypergraph
- [datalog-block-query](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/datalog-block-query.md): Older Loom videos
- [Release notes](https://roam-docs.pages.dev/docs/release-notes.md): Dated updates from the developer graph (newest first)
